item.name: Authentic Valentione Cake Pairing
item.description:
Rich cake powdered with dark chocolate and paired with a fine wine (now authentically aged for your enjoyment).

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Skill Speed Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
